title: Project Context Protocol
purpose: This is shared project orientation memory files for human/agent working sessions. This is not an agent's personal memory, nor should it ever contain inter-personal reflections. This is a shared memory bank used as the last layer of an agent's boot sequence to orient them to a session's work.

contents.name: activeContext.md
contents.description: Current project orientation — what was last worked on and what is coming next

contents.name: decisionLog.md
contents.description: Log of decisions made by the Prime User after collaborating with the Senior Advisor

contents.name: systemPatterns.md
contents.description: Project-level patterns and preferences — like user_profile but oriented to the project itself
